data.title: Sherwin-Williams Q4 Earnings Report: What Investors Need to Know
data.description:
Sherwin-Williams (NYSE:SHW) released its Q4 earnings on Thursday, January 29, 2026 at 07:00 AM.

Here's what's important from the earnings announcement.

Earnings

Sherwin-Williams beat estimated earnings by 4.0%, reporting an EPS of $2.23 versus an estimate of $2.15.

Revenue was up $298.00 million from the same period last year.

Historical Earnings Summary

Last quarter the company beat on EPS by $0.14 which was followed by a 2.0% drop in the share price the next day.

Here's a look at Sherwin-Williams's past performance:

New investors should note that it is sometimes not an earnings beat or miss that most affects the price of a stock, but the guidance (or forecast).

Guidance

Sherwin-Williams management provided guidance for FY 2026, expecting earnings between $11.5 and $11.9 per share.
